caption: A green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) is parked indoors, likely in a garage or workshop, with a concrete floor and equipment visible in the background. The ATV is equipped with a large green storage box mounted on the front rack, which is protected by a black metal brush guard. A single headlight is centrally mounted above the storage box. The vehicle features rugged, knobby tires suitable for off-road use. No people are present in the scene. Across the frames, the camera remains stationary and there is no visible movement or change in the position of the ATV or the surrounding environment. The lighting and composition remain constant, showing the front three-quarter view of the green utility vehicle.
